login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to your account to continue
login.pageDescription: Sign in to your Hay dashboard account

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.accountLocked: Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again later.
errors.accountSuspended: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support for assistance.
errors.networkError: Unable to sign in. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.resendFailed: Failed to resend verification email. Please try again.

login.emailNotVerified: Your email address hasn't been verified yet.
login.emailNotVerifiedDescription: Please check your inbox for the verification link. If you can't find it, you can request a new one.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.descriptionInvitation: Complete your account to join the organization
signup.description: Get started with your Hay organization
signup.orgNameHelper: This will be used to identify your workspace
signup.emailHelper: This will be your admin account email
signup.marketingConsent: I would like to receive product updates and marketing communications

errors.orgNameMinLength: Organization name must be at least 2 characters
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.nameMinLength: Full name must be at least 2 characters
errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service to continue
errors.emailExists: An account with this email address already exists. Please try signing in instead.
errors.weakPassword: Password does not meet security requirements. Please choose a stronger password.
errors.generic: Unable to create your account. Please check your information and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailHelper: We'll send a reset link to this email address
forgotPassword.successDescription: We've sent a password reset link to
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Check your spam folder or try resending the link.
forgotPassword.pageDescription: Reset your Hay dashboard account password

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

toast.sendFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
toast.resendFailed: Failed to resend email. Please try again.

resetPassword.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your password reset link...
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.newPasswordHelper: Must be at least 8 characters long
resetPassword.pageDescription: Reset your Hay dashboard account password

errors.noToken: No reset token provided. Please check your email for the reset link.
errors.verifyFailed: Failed to verify reset token. Please try again.
errors.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

toast.success: Password reset successful! You can now log in with your new password.
